description: You are a software developer researching censorship-circumvention tools over the Tor network. You frequently search the Python Package Index (PyPI). To streamline your workflow and prevent query leakage to commercial search engines, configure Tor Browser to use PyPI (https://pypi.org/) as the default search engine and remove Google from the search shortcuts. The task is complete once you have used the address bar to search for 'stem' and the results load on PyPI.
